suggestions.reason: The current text already has 'Einfacher Fix', but the previous judge report suggested it was 'Einfaches'. Checking the provided source, it is already correct. No change needed.

suggestions.match: > Over my career, I've written many PR's for dozens of 10,000-Star repositories. My modest contributions have landed in Node.js, Docker, Lodash, Bluebird, Gatsby, Rancher, Angular, React Router, Minio, MDN (Mozilla Developer Network) and many more.
suggestions.replacement: > Im Laufe meiner Karriere habe ich viele PRs für Dutzende von Repositories mit 10.000 Sternen geschrieben. Meine bescheidenen Beiträge sind in Node.js, Docker, Lodash, Bluebird, Gatsby, Rancher, Angular, React Router, Minio, MDN (Mozilla Developer Network) und vielen anderen gelandet.
suggestions.reason: The blockquote containing the author's credentials was left in English in the current translation. It should be translated to maintain consistency.

rationale: The translation correctly adopts the informal 'du' tone which matches the author's style. It preserves MDX structure and frontmatter. One typo ('istzwar') and an untranslated blockquote need fixing to reach production quality.

suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.

suggestionLog.reason: The German sentence structure is slightly awkward; adding 'einfach' or reordering improves the flow of Dan's direct style.
